event.description: Transmission received from Earth — first in years

colonist_diaries.entry:
Year 67 — Frost Nakamura (water)
Mood: anxious. Event: Transmission received from Earth — first in years.
Action: gather_food. Colony morale: strained.

Year 67 — Titan (fire)
Mood: contemplative. Event: Transmission received from Earth — first in years.
Action: gather_food. Colony morale: strained.

Year 67 — Phobos (fire)
Mood: contemplative. Event: Transmission received from Earth — first in years.
Action: gather_food. Colony morale: strained.

meta_insight: Year 67: Frost Nakamura proposes that recursive self-modeling reveals the colony itself may be a sub-simulation — governance should account for the possibility that their decisions are being observed

simulation_awareness.insight: Frost Nakamura questions the nature of their reality
